title: Gateways to Eternity - More Gateways
description: Adds more modded gateways to Gateways to Eternity
body:
This mod simply adds more gateways to Gateways to Eternity by Shadows_of_Fire.

Currently, it only has compatibility between:

Alexs Mobs
Born in Chaos
Deeper and Darker
Jaden's Nether Expansion
L-Enders Cataclysm
 

But many more will be added in the future. If you want Gateways for other modded mobs, leave a comment, and I'll most likely add it.

To be added:

Iron's Spells and Spellbooks

Alex's Caves

Mowzie's Mobs
